title: Gemini is getting its first agentic capabilities
content: Google's Gemini AI is getting one step closer to being more like an actual assistant. Starting with automated workflows and data analysis, Gemini can now perform tasks on your behalf across various Google services and third-party tools.

title: These A.I. Dreamers Don't Fit the Stereotype
content: Young tech entrepreneurs in San Francisco are hoping to cash in, even as they wonder how artificial intelligence will change their lives forever. A new wave of founders is building apps that focus on creativity and human connection.

title: Building My First Neural Network from Scratch
content: A deep dive into how I built a feedforward neural network using only NumPy — no PyTorch, no TensorFlow. What I learned changed how I think about backpropagation and weight optimization.
